svg.title: GIS RAG pipeline with Neo4j and LLM map rendering
svg.desc: Full pipeline from document ingestion through entity extraction, Neo4j graph storage, LLM reasoning, and real map visualization

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about document ingestion options for GIS RAG')
g.text: PDF, DOCX, TXT via unstructured + OCR fallback

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does coordinate regex extraction work?')
sendPrompt('How does spaCy NER extract place names?')
sendPrompt('How does date extraction work with dateutil?')
sendPrompt('How does geocoding resolve place names to lat/lon?')
g.text: Nominatim / Google Maps API — resolve place names → lat/lon

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I model GIS entities in Neo4j?')
g.text: Nodes: GeoPoint · Place · Date · Person · Document
Spatial index on lat/lon for proximity queries

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I add vector embeddings to Neo4j for RAG?')
g.text: Embed node context → store in Neo4j vector index (or Qdrant)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the RAG query layer work for GIS questions?')
g.text: User query → embed → vector search → Cypher subgraph fetch
Combine: semantic hits + graph neighbourhood (1–2 hops)
Pack context → LLM (Claude / GPT-4o) with structured output schema

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What structured output schema should the LLM return for map rendering?')
g.text: JSON: [{name, lat, lon, type, summary, date}] + answer text

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What map libraries can I use to render GIS points?')
g.text: Leaflet.js / Mapbox GL / Folium — pins, routes, clusters on real tiles

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the final GIS RAG output look like?')
g.text: Interactive map + LLM answer + source document citations
